{{Infobox group
| name = Kazan clan
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Kazan clan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Kazan]] clan is a prominent group within [[Sacred Valley]], characterized by an aggressive and blunt nature. They are known for their distinct appearance, often wearing armor regardless of necessity; men typically wear red robes with helmets or leather and iron belts, while women wear mail-integrated silk dresses. Their identity is marked by red sashes and banners featuring three stone dogs, as well as oversized copper or iron badges that function like breastplates. The clan's presence is often signaled by the loud sound of trumpets and a large advancing army that causes the ground to tremble. In terms of political standing, the [[Kazan]] have seen a decline in influence and are no longer considered among the top ten families in [[Sacred Valley]]. Despite this, they remain active competitors in events like the [[Seven-Year Festival]], where they vie for status alongside the Wei and [[Li]] clans. The clan's territory is protected by sturdy walls made of large bricks and mortared with old [[scripts]], featuring bronze gates reinforced with goldsteel or [[halfsilver]]. Their leadership includes a Patriarch, described as a stocky, bearded man who wears a bear's pelt and chainmail. While some view them as lacking subtlety, the [[Kazan]] are capable of significant martial displays and have demonstrated a willingness to fight alongside others against common threats.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan clan]] is maneuvering aggressively for a [[Wei clan]] farm by the river.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan clan]]'s color in the [[arena]] is brown and red.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan]] Clan contains [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Kazan clan]] has members serving as sentries in the camp.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Located to the west of the valley, the [[Kazan]] clan is a large group led by a Patriarch and protected by boundary fields. Their expansive territory features walls constructed of large bricks mortared with old [[scripts]], while their gates are made of hammered bronze lined with goldsteel or [[halfsilver]]. Although the clan participated in the [[Seven-Year Festival]], they were caught off-guard when the sky turned gold. Following the loss of their [[sacred artists]], the clan was buried before eventually reaching the base of [[Mount Samara]]. Ultimately, the [[Kazan]] clan and [[Ziel]] reached [[Heaven's Glory]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is a group [[Lindon]] needs to visit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is located to the west of the valley.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] has a territory with walls made of large bricks mortared by old [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]]'s gates are hammered bronze lined with [[halfsilver]] or goldsteel.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is led by a Patriarch.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] has a large territory and uses alarms of war and riders to gather.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] participated in the [[Seven-Year Festival]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] uses boundary fields.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] was caught off-guard by the sky turning gold.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] is not from the [[Kazan clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[sacred artists]] were members of the [[Kazan clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] is buried.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Kazan clan]] reached the base of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ziel]] and the [[Kazan clan]] reached [[Heaven's Glory]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The young [[sacred artists]] on the stage are from the Wei and [[Kazan]] clans.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Kazan clan]] is no longer among the top ten families in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“The Kazan in particular are maneuvering aggressively for one of our farms by the river.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“You’re not from the Kazan clan!” Elder Rahm shouted.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
